story.text:
# 🛠️ Skill Nodes

87 `skill` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[Academic Research]] — Formal methods, proofs, research methodology, academic publishing.
- [[Agent Interop]] — Agent-to-agent communication, protocol interoperability, A2A.
- [[AI Agent Design]] — Multi-agent systems, autonomous agents, AI safety, agent coordination.
- [[Amnesia Protocol]] — Forgetting as structural requirement. Foundation of Selene's Proof. The Moon ser
- [[Armor Progression]] — Trust tier progression, Blade → Light → Heavy → Dragon.
- [[Atlas Geometry]] — 96-vertex Atlas, exceptional groups G₂→E₈, holographic boundary.
- [[Behavioural Density]] — R(d, compression, ρ) where ρ is traversal depth, temporal duration, intentional 
- [[Blade Forge]] — 6D blade configuration mechanics. 64 vertices (2⁶), 96 edges. Pascal tier distri
- [[Boundary Enforcement]] — Privacy boundary mechanisms, access control, separation enforcement.
- [[Browser Privacy]] — Browser extensions, consent management, tracker blocking, privacy UX, MyTerms/IE
- [[Ceremonial Blade Forge]] — Sun/Moon ceremony mechanics. Solo vs paired forging. Constellation to blade comp
- [[Ceremony Engine]] — Five ceremony types: Progressive Trust, Light Armor, Trust Graph, Guild Efficien
- [[Chain-Agnostic Storage]] — One holon, many ProviderUniqueStorageKey entries. Solana key, Ethereum key, IPFS
- [[Compression-as-Defence]] — BRAID 74× compression reduces attack surface multiplicatively. Seven-layer compr
- [[Consent Infrastructure]] — Consent management, privacy preferences, user control.
- [[Constellation Method]] — Mapping knowledge constellations, relationship visualization.
- [[Content Addressing (skill)]] — GUID derivation, holonic persistence, three-layer identity.
- [[Cosmological Bound]] — Act XXXI meta-skill. The Sun-Earth-Moon-Human quaternion. Validates Selene's Pro
- [[Cross-Chain]] — Cross-chain operations, bridge security, multi-chain sovereignty.
- [[Crypto ZKP]] — Zero-knowledge proof systems. Groth16, PLONK, Nova circuits, proof composition, 
- [[Dark Forest]] — MEV research, adversarial coordination, encrypted mempool strategies, economic d
- [[Data Dignity]] — Data as labor, data dignity movement, Lanier's vision.
- [[Derivation Certificate]] — VRC as content-addressed derivation chain with witnesses.
- [[Dihedral Sovereignty]] — D₂ₙ group structure, Φ_agent as determinant, generator independence.
- [[Dragon Flight]] — Threshold activation when Drake anatomy complete. Five acts: boundary, hide, bra
- [[Dragon Skill]] — Pattern-space intelligence, sovereign value conditions, Drake teachings.
- [[Dual Territory]] — Three-territory architecture: Swordsman (agentprivacy.ai), Mage (spellweb.ai), S
- [[Dual-Agent Harness]] — The shareable soulbis ⚔️ ⊥ soulbae 🧙 skeleton (~/dual-agent-harness · rebuilt 2
- [[Edge Value]] — Relationship value calculation, edge weighting, trust metrics.
- [[Enclave Operations]] — TEE operations, SGX/TDX, secure enclaves, attestation.
- [[Environmental Commons]] — Polycentric governance for environmental coordination. Carbon accounting, enviro
- [[Five Strikes]] — neg, bnot, xor, and, or as lattice transformations with privacy meanings.
- [[Forensic Defense]] — Anti-forensics, plausible deniability, secure deletion.
- [[Governance Agents]] — AI agents in governance, automated policy, agent voting.
- [[Grimoire Navigation]] — Spellbook navigation, knowledge graph traversal, documentation architecture.
- [[Guild Efficiency]] — G(guilds) network term. O(1) vs O(N²) scaling through shared-parent coordination
- [[Hemispheric Attention]] — McGilchrist's five attention modes: vigilance, sustained, alertness, focused, di
- [[Hexagram Convergence]] — I Ching mapping for blade configurations. 64 hexagrams as sovereignty states. Si
- [[Hitchhiker Governance]] — Don't panic governance, distributed decision-making, 42 as guide.
- [[Holonic Architecture]] — Building identity-independent data structures. Parent-child nesting, provider-ag
- [[Inscription Mechanics]] — Blockchain inscriptions, on-chain attestations, permanent records.
- [[Intel Pooling]] — Intelligence sharing, privacy-preserving collaboration, secure aggregation.
- [[Key Ceremony]] — Genesis ceremonies, key generation, multi-party computation.
- [[Knowledge Graph]] — Graph structures, semantic relationships, knowledge representation.
- [[Mana Economy]] — Proof-of-practice, not proof-of-capital. Evocation generates mana, casting spend
- [[Master-Emissary Pattern]] — McGilchrist integration. Five attention modes mapped to protocol functions. Divi
- [[Media Plurality]] — Signal vs noise in information ecosystems. Community-funded journalism, federate
- [[Mesh Architecture]] — Control plane vs data plane separation at network layer. Tailnets, WireGuard mes
- [[Metadata Resistance]] — Traffic analysis resistance, timing attacks, metadata minimization.
- [[Narrative Compression]] — Educational infrastructure, knowledge graphs, proverbiogenesis, story diffusion.
- [[Network Topology]] — Network structure analysis, stratum-weighted effects, betweenness centrality C_B
- [[Nullifier Design]] — Double-spend prevention, nullifier schemes, commitment-nullifier patterns.
- [[Path Integral]] — T_∫(π) replaces additive edge value. Value from trajectory through sovereignty s
- [[Perimeter Hardening]] — Infrastructure security, network hardening, defense in depth.
- [[Personhood & Sybil]] — Sybil resistance, biometric alternatives, unique human verification, proof-of-pe
- [[Plurality Cooperative]] — Quadratic mechanisms, collaborative technology, digital democracy, Pol.is.
- [[Policy Governance]] — Standards bodies (BGIN, ToIP, IEEE, IIW), regulatory frameworks, governance desi
- [[Pretext Measurement]] — DOM-free text measurement via @chenglou/pretext. One canvas measureText call, th
- [[Privacy Economics]] — Data economics, tokenomics, privacy-preserving markets, sovereignty economics.
- [[Promise Theory (skill)]] — Bergstra & Burgess foundations, autonomy axiom, agent promises.
- [[Proverbiogenesis]] — Creating proverbs from narratives, compression to memorable forms.
- [[Provider Abstraction]] — IOASISStorageProvider contract implementation. Save/Load/Delete operations mappi
- [[Quantum Defence]] — Post-quantum threat model. secp256k1 at ≤1,200 qubits. 2D algebraic space vs 6D 
- [[Quaternion Mapping]] — Sun/Earth/Moon/Human cosmological cast. Maps to Selene's Proof: Moon embodies or
- [[Recovery RPP]] — Social recovery, Relationship Proverb Protocol for recovery.
- [[Reflect/Connect Recursion]] — 🌙 Reflect (night): forge second blade on altered ground. 🌍 Connect (day): witn
- [[Reputation Credentials]] — Verifiable credentials, reputation systems, trust building.
- [[Revocation Mechanics]] — Credential revocation, key revocation, privacy-preserving revocation lists.
- [[Ring Algebra]] — Z/(2⁶)Z foundation. Five operations, Pascal distribution, stratum as popcount.
- [[Selective Disclosure]] — Reveal only what's needed. ZK credentials, attribute-based proofs.
- [[Separation Enforcement]] — Agent separation, conditional independence, leakage prevention.
- [[Sovereignty Economics]] — 7th capital economics, behavioral sovereignty valuation.
- [[Spell Encoding]] — Emoji spell encoding, compact symbolic representation, compression.
- [[Spellweb Navigation]] — Grimoire navigation at scale. Acts as nodes, proverbs as waypoints, boundaries a
- [[Story Diffusion]] — Narrative propagation, meme engineering, cultural transmission.
- [[Stranger Ceremony]] — Understanding-as-Key for strangers. Anonymous pairing, simultaneous forging.
- [[Temporal Dynamics]] — Time-based analysis, temporal attestations, A(τ) memory.
- [[Tetrahedral Sovereignty]] — 64-vertex lattice, star tetrahedra, sovereignty dimensions.
- [[Theia Derivation]] — Origin witness skill. Grounds Selene's Proof — Theia is the unknowable origin th
- [[Threat Adversarial]] — Threat modeling, adversarial analysis, attack surface reduction.
- [[Toroidal Witness]] — Infinite cyclic paths create computational hardness for witness extraction.
- [[Trust Graph Formation]] — Hitchhiker graph seeding through ceremony. Collision → edge → propagation. The t
- [[Trust Spanning]] — Building trust bridges, cross-community trust, spanning trees.
- [[Understanding as Key (skill)]] — Comprehension-based auth, Zypherpunk paper, proverb verification.
- [[UOR Toroidal]] — Toroidal geometry, 96-edge structure, recursive patterns.
- [[VRC Identity]] — Verifiable Relationship Credentials, bilateral trust formation.
- [[Witness Protocol]] — Receiving without tracing. Recording without interpreting. The accumulation of m

---
